name: FlagshipJudge (zero-shot)
short_description: Zero-shot flagship-VLM annotator + per-language confidence calibration
long_description: A frontier vision-language model is prompted zero-shot as a span annotator: it receives the image, the original prompt, and the response, and returns hallucinated fragments as verbatim quotes with a 1-3 confidence and one of the five task labels. Quotes are string-matched back to character offsets; span prob = confidence/3. A per-language confidence filter (tuned on a 50% split of the internal gold, evaluated on the other half) decides which spans to keep. No training, no fine-tuning; single model, single pass per sample. Full coverage of all 2,281 internal test ids.
